title: eleocharis × yezoensis
intro: Eleocharis × yezoensis, also known as Zosterella dubia, is a hybrid of the Eleocharis plant species, a type of sedge that is commonly found in wetland areas. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Eleocharis × yezoensis include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and treat skin conditions. In traditional herbal preparations, the plant's roots and rhizomes are often used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions to harness its medicinal properties.
